refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable monitoring, controlling, and optimizing energy consumption to meet the customer-defined energy efficiency target.
refined_fr.rationale: Energy efficiency KPI requires decomposing the high-level requirement into measurable and actionable sub-functions: monitoring energy use, controlling energy consumption, and optimizing operations to reduce energy per ton moved.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by measuring energy_per_ton over the evaluation period and comparing against E_target; validate monitoring data accuracy; confirm control actions reduce energy use; assess optimization algorithms effectiveness.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor energy consumption and tonnage moved in real-time.
FR2: Control vehicle operations to minimize energy usage.
FR3: Optimize operational parameters to achieve energy efficiency target.

candidate_dps: DP1: Deploy integrated energy and load sensors with telemetry reporting.
DP2: Implement adaptive vehicle control algorithms for energy management.
DP3: Use data analytics and machine learning for operational optimization.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1, DP2, and DP3 combined to address monitoring, control, and optimization respectively.

potential_sources: Data dependency between monitoring (DP1) and control (DP2)
Feedback loop from optimization (DP3) to control (DP2)
coupling_check.notes: Coupling is expected and managed via well-defined telemetry and control interfaces; modular separation supports maintainability.

assumptions_risks: Assumes reliable sensor data and network connectivity.
Risk of control algorithm not adapting well to varying conditions.
Risk that optimization models may require frequent retraining.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Ensure clear interface definitions and fallback modes for sensor or network failures.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system integration of energy monitoring, control, and optimization functions.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Used for real-time energy and tonnage data reporting and control command feedback.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Commands sent to Vehicle for adaptive control actions.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Communication backbone supporting data exchange between modules.

module_containment_scores.notes: Centralizes energy efficiency functions with minimal diffusion; high containment.
Contains control actuators but limited monitoring and optimization logic.
Primarily for remote control, not energy management.
Focused on safety alerts, unrelated to energy efficiency.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Energy efficiency functions are best contained within the NGHE Solution module to minimize diffusion and enable integrated management.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module due to integration of multiple functions.
Dependency on reliable network link for telemetry and tasking.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Consider modular sub-packaging within NGHE Solution to separate monitoring, control, and optimization for maintainability.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs are well matched by selected DPs covering monitoring, control, and optimization with clear verification paths.

diffusion_risks: Integration complexity within NGHE Solution module.
Network dependency for telemetry and control.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as the primary module; diffusion is low and manageable.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data analysis and operational testing within NGHE Solution boundaries.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FRs to NGHE Solution with interfaces to Vehicle and network modules.

recommended_revisions: Define sub-modules within NGHE Solution for better separation of concerns.
Develop fallback strategies for telemetry or network failures.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and mapping to design parameters and implementation modules is consistent, verifiable, and architecturally sound with manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor energy consumption and tonnage moved in real-time.
FR2: Control vehicle operations to minimize energy usage.
FR3: Optimize operational parameters to achieve energy efficiency target.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Effective integration within NGHE Solution module.
open_risks: Network failures impacting telemetry and control.
